title: Graphic Desires
tmdbOverview: When reclusive Franklin cheats on his partner with a mysterious girl he meets on a dating app, it becomes the start of a deadly obsession.
synopsis: Graphic Desires is a 2023 thriller and crime film from United Kingdom. It has a 4.2 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 18 certification (KR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
